elements.description: A hand reaching out toward a small glowing coin floating in mid-air, surrounded by a faint golden aura. The coin represents something valuable or extra.
The glowing coin now held delicately in the palm of a hand, but the golden aura begins to fade, symbolizing uncertainty or impermanence.
The coin dissolving into shimmering particles, vanishing into thin air, leaving the hand empty and the background stark white.
